description_long: This is a classic black steam locomotive with a cylindrical boiler, a prominent smokestack, and several domed features along the top. The body is detailed with metallic rods and wheels, including large driving wheels and smaller leading wheels, all connected by visible linkages. The front features a pair of buffers and a coupling hook, while the rear has a cab area with a small window. The surface appears weathered, with subtle hints of rust and wear, suggesting heavy use. The train is primarily constructed from metal, with some glass elements for the windows and possible rubber or plastic for smaller components. Its robust build and traditional design evoke early to mid-20th-century rail transport.
description: A black, weathered steam locomotive with large driving wheels, metallic rods, and a cylindrical boiler. The train features a classic design with visible mechanical details and a sturdy, industrial appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the locomotive, including the large wheels, connecting rods, and the detailed boiler structure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the smokestack, buffers, coupling hook, and the symmetrical arrangement of the domes and lights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, but with slight differences in visible mechanical details and cab features.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the cab area, small window, and the back end of the locomotive.
